training_status: advanced athlete, consistent lifting splits and cardio for 2 years

compounds.frequency: weekly, titrated to every 5 days at max dose

benefits.description: Allowed perfectly hitting macros daily without hunger, described as eating like a robot
Successfully got shredded for 40th birthday, maintained leanness when on Tirz
Cured ongoing IBS issues, resolved bloating and gas, expanded food variety without IBS flare-ups
Reduced alcohol cravings and carb cravings
Improved sleep quality when combined with dietary changes

side_effects.description: Nausea at higher doses interfered with eating ability and energy levels
Developed high tolerance over 12 months; each dose increment lasted only 4-6 weeks before requiring re-titration

protocol_notes: 5'9" height. Started at 2.5mg Tirz and titrated by 2.5mg increments every 4-6 weeks until reaching 15mg. Also on TRT+ protocol with 160mg test, 60mg primo, ipamorelin/modgrf, tadalafil, and creatine. Took 2-3 week breaks from Tirz but reported feeling better and staying leaner when on it. Made significant dietary changes 2 years ago based on ALCAT test and naturopath guidance; learned macro tracking. Combined peptide use with consistent training for almost 2 years. Not prescribed; purchased online.
